source_basis: Digitized Gross and Sadowski 2002 Figure 8 liquid-liquid branch points at P = 1.013 bar plus retained Gross 2002 Table 1 and Table 2 parameter rows.
parameter_basis: Methanol is the Gross and Sadowski 2002 Table 1 2B associating row. Cyclohexane is the retained neutral row in the Gross 2002 parameter bundle, sourced to Gross 2001 Table 2 and used by the Gross 2002 Table 2 methanol/cyclohexane binary target.
binary_interaction_basis: Gross and Sadowski 2002 Table 2 PC-SAFT k_ij for methanol-cyclohexane.
follow_on_stress_target: water/1-pentanol from Gross and Sadowski 2002 Figure 10, after the one-associating-component proof is green.
scope_statement: This fixture retains internal exact-Hessian source-pair evidence for one neutral associating binary LLE with one associating component. It does not establish global HELD phase-set completeness or admit public associating GFPE, electrolyte, reactive, CE, CPE, LLLE, or generalized associating phase-set behavior.
